heading: Acceptance and use of donations
label: 5305 Acceptance and use of donations
text: The Secretary may accept and use donations to provide assistance under . Amounts received by the Secretary in the form of donations shall be transferred to the Secretary of the Treasury for deposit into the Fund.section 5304 of this title
notes: Amendments2002— redesignated heading and text of subsec. (d) as entire section and struck out former section catchline and headings and text of subsecs. (a) to (c). Prior to amendment, text of subsecs. (a) to (c) related to establishment in the Treasury of the Rhinoceros and Tiger Conservation Fund, consisting of amounts deposited by the Secretary of the Treasury from donations and appropriated funds, to be used to provide assistance under , with not more than three percent of appropriated funds per fiscal year used to administer the Fund.Pub. L. 107–112section 5304 of this title
